news.paragraph: Nvidia is seeing positive momentum following a price target increase from Bank of America to $320 and news of its expansion into AI data center connectivity. Additionally, CEO Jensen Huang's participation in a China delegation has drawn market attention and contributed to recent price gains. Traders should monitor potential geopolitical developments resulting from this diplomatic trip.
headlines: Why NVIDIA (NVDA) Is Pushing Deeper Into AI Data Center Connectivity
BofA Raises Price Target on Nvidia to $320 From $300, Keeps Buy, Top Sector Pick
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Joins Trump's China Delegation
Stocks to Watch Wednesday: Nvidia, Walmart, Micron, Samsung
Market Chatter: Nvidia Chief Executive Jensen Huang Joins Trump China Trip
Nvidia rises after Trump says Huang joined China delegation (NVDA)
